zenith.title: Zenith
zenith.subtitle: Your personal AI assistant
zenith.auth_required_desc: Please sign in to access your Zenith AI assistant.
zenith.repo_name_desc: Name of your Gitea repository with .md files

zenith.welcome_desc: Ask me anything based on your knowledge base
